output.sparql:
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?player ?domesticTeam ?homeGround WHERE {
  ?player wdt:P27 wd:Q66634 ; wdt:P1545 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P585 ?eventDate ; wdt:P31 wd:Q129397 .
  FILTER(YEAR(?eventDate) = 1999)
  ?player p:P106 [ ps:P106 wd:Q253983 ; pq:P585 ?umpireDate ] .
  FILTER(YEAR(?umpireDate) = 2006)
  ?player wdt:P176 ?domesticTeam .
  ?domesticTeam wdt:P178 ?homeGround .
}
